response.justification: While Bogdan has strong general software engineering credentials and appropriate seniority (16+ years, multiple staff-level roles), the role requires deep expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, GPU optimization, and deep-learning workload analysis—areas entirely absent from his resume. His background is almost exclusively full-stack and backend software development. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work appears to focus on MCP tooling rather than ML workload optimization. The gap between required core competencies and demonstrated experience is too significant.
strengths: Senior/staff-level software engineer with 16+ years spanning web, backend, mobile, and embedded systems
Some systems-level experience: low-latency microservices optimization, C++ measurement software, microarchitecture awareness through high-performance database work
Meets educational requirement (BS in CS) and demonstrates continuous learning across diverse technical domains
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience—core requirement for the principal role
Career lacks GPU optimization, AI accelerator tuning, or deep-learning workload analysis—all essential for the position
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work focuses on software tooling (MCP generators) rather than ML/hardware performance optimization

key_factors.factor: No GPU or AI accelerator optimization background
Strong general software engineering and seniority level
